text: Improved UI across multiple screens
Added header accent color support
Added search page for online recipes
Added recipe instructions field
Removed recipe description field
Added recipe number of persons field
Made all images clickable
Added reminder notification when a product is still in the list
Improved buttons to add text/image from products search page
Improved buttons to favorite/unfavorite recipes and edit recipes
Improved products search
Add to list from the products search page
Option to use the new UI (liquid glass design)
Improved recipes page layout
Updated search page
Hold down on an product in the list to get suggestions
You can now favorite/unfavorite recipes
Weekly List - adds products automatically every week
Notifications for added, removed and weekly added products
Images are stored on own storage service
Images load quicker and are cached
Filter for recipes and added more fields
